title: View Multiple / All Groups on the Llama Farm Widget (board views)
excerpt: The Llama Farm widget only allows me to select a single group in the settings. It would be much more useful if there was an option to select multiple or all groups.

posts.author: BenW (Ben Walter)
posts.cookedHtml: The Llama Farm widget only allows me to select a single group in the settings. It would be much more useful if there was an option to select multiple or all groups.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @BenW!

You should be able to choose and view multiple groups within the Llama farm widget:

Screen Shot 2023-05-31 at 1.58.15 pm1139×608 114 KB

Is this the functionality you’re looking for? Let me know

posts.author: LizA1 (Liz)
posts.cookedHtml: Rather than checkbox options for groups, my display shows a drop down where I can only select one group. How do I change this to be able to check multiple groups?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you please share a screenshot of what you see?

posts.author: LizA1 (Liz)
posts.cookedHtml: llama1619×687 110 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for sharing! My apologies, I can see that you’re referring to the Llama farm widget in board views, and not the dashboard. At this stage, only one group can be selected within the board view widget. Thank you for sharing your request
